site.title: 八宝轩 De Li Trade - 专业风水用品与命理咨询

hero.taglineChinese: 专业风水用品 · 宗教用品 · 命理咨询
hero.taglineEnglish: Professional Feng Shui Products, Religious Items & Astrology Services
hero.backgroundStyle: bg-gradient-to-b from-red-900 via-red-800 to-red-900 with translucent decorative circles

paragraphsChinese: 八宝轩（De Li Trade）是一家位于新加坡武吉巴督的专业风水用品店，致力于为顾客提供优质的风水用品、宗教用品及专业的命理咨询服务。
我们的使命是帮助每一位顾客通过传统的风水智慧改善生活，获得好运与平安。
paragraphsEnglish: We are a professional Feng Shui shop located in Bukit Batok, Singapore, dedicated to providing high-quality Feng Shui products, religious items, and professional astrology consultation services.
Our mission is to help every customer improve their lives through traditional Feng Shui wisdom, bringing good fortune and peace.

features.descriptionChinese: 精选优质风水用品，每件产品都经过精心挑选
features.descriptionEnglish: Premium quality Feng Shui products, carefully selected

features.descriptionChinese: 专业顾问一对一服务，为您量身定制解决方案
传承中华传统文化，结合现代生活需求
features.descriptionEnglish: Preserving Chinese traditions with modern applications

items.descriptionChinese: 提供各类专业风水用品，包括水晶、摆件、吉祥物等，助您改善居家及办公环境的气场。
items.descriptionEnglish: Professional Feng Shui products including crystals, ornaments, and auspicious items to improve your living and working spaces.

items.descriptionChinese: 精选佛教、道教等宗教用品，包括香炉、念珠、佛像等，满足您的信仰需求。
items.descriptionEnglish: Buddhist, Taoist, and other religious items including incense burners, prayer beads, Buddha statues, and more.

items.descriptionChinese: 专业八字命理分析，解读您的命运走向、事业财运、婚姻感情等人生重要方面。
items.descriptionEnglish: Professional Bazi (Eight Characters) destiny analysis for career, wealth, relationships, and life direction.

items.descriptionChinese: 紫微斗数命盘解析，深入了解您的性格特质、运势起伏、吉凶祸福。
items.descriptionEnglish: Zi Wei Dou Shu (Purple Star Astrology) chart interpretation to understand your personality, fortune cycles, and destiny.

businessHours.noteChinese: 每日营业（包括周末及公共假期）
businessHours.noteEnglish: Open daily including weekends and public holidays

items.name: Helen
items.reviewChinese: 八宝轩的产品质量很好，老板也很专业。购买了风水摆件后，家里的运势确实有所改善！
items.reviewEnglish: Great quality products and very professional service. After buying Feng Shui items, my home energy has improved significantly!

items.name: Chris
items.reviewChinese: 来这里算八字非常准确！师傅分析得很透彻，给了我很多有用的建议。强烈推荐！
items.reviewEnglish: The Bazi reading was incredibly accurate! The master provided thorough analysis and very helpful advice. Highly recommended!

businessHours.note: Open daily including weekends & public holidays
